name: Geno Bisconte
bio: Geno Bisconte is an American stand-up comedian, writer, and radio host raised in Vineland, New Jersey, and based in New York City. Known for an insult-driven club style, he has written for the Comedy Central Roasts of Charlie Sheen and Rob Lowe and appeared on Gotham Comedy Live and Crashing. He has hosted radio and podcast shows alongside Artie Lange and Anthony Cumia, including In Hot Water on Compound Media.

timeline.ev: Writes for the Comedy Central Roast of Charlie Sheen
Writes for the Comedy Central Roast of Rob Lowe
Appears on the HBO series Crashing
